title: Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA)
summary: Managing quality issues through corrective and preventive actions.
purpose: To eliminate root causes of quality, safety or compliance issues and prevent recurrence.
prerequisites: Quality incident, complaint, audit finding or non-conformance identified.

steps.title: Identify the Issue
steps.body: Document the problem, affected products, dates and observations.

steps.title: Contain the Risk
steps.body: Quarantine affected stock and prevent further impact.

steps.title: Investigate Root Cause
steps.body: Determine the underlying cause rather than symptoms.

steps.title: Develop Corrective Actions
steps.body: Define actions to resolve the immediate issue.

steps.title: Develop Preventive Actions
steps.body: Implement improvements to prevent recurrence.

steps.title: Verify Effectiveness
steps.body: Confirm actions have successfully resolved the issue.

troubleshooting: Escalate unresolved CAPAs to management review.

title: Bond Management
summary: Management of excisable goods held under bond.
purpose: To ensure compliance with excise obligations and maintain inventory accuracy.
safety_notes: Observe warehouse and spirit handling procedures.

steps.title: Identify Bonded Stock
steps.body: Clearly distinguish bonded inventory from duty-paid stock.

steps.title: Record Movements
steps.body: Document all transfers into and out of bond.

steps.title: Maintain Security
steps.body: Restrict access to authorised personnel.

steps.title: Conduct Stock Reconciliations
steps.body: Regularly compare physical and recorded balances.

steps.title: Retain Documentation
steps.body: Maintain records for excise audit purposes.

troubleshooting: Investigate all unexplained bond stock variances immediately.

title: Excise Compliance
summary: Overview of excise obligations applying to spirit production.
purpose: To ensure staff understand the importance of excise compliance.

steps.title: Understand Excisable Goods
steps.body: Spirits and spirit-based products are subject to excise requirements.

steps.title: Maintain Accurate Records
steps.body: Record production, packaging and inventory movements.

steps.title: Protect Bonded Stock
steps.body: Ensure excisable inventory remains traceable.

steps.title: Support Reconciliations
steps.body: Assist with stocktakes and inventory reviews.

steps.title: Escalate Concerns
steps.body: Report discrepancies immediately.

troubleshooting: Escalate excise-related concerns to management immediately.

title: Excise Reconciliation
summary: Reconciliation of production, inventory and excise records.
purpose: To ensure excise records accurately reflect stock holdings.

steps.title: Review Production Records
steps.body: Verify all production batches have been recorded.

steps.title: Review Inventory Movements
steps.body: Confirm all stock transactions are recorded.

steps.title: Perform Physical Verification
steps.body: Compare inventory records against physical stock.

steps.title: Investigate Variances
steps.body: Identify causes of discrepancies.

steps.title: Document Outcomes
steps.body: Maintain records of investigations and adjustments.

troubleshooting: Escalate unresolved variances before reporting periods close.

title: Preparing the EX46 Excise Return
summary: Preparation of periodic excise reporting information.
purpose: To support accurate excise return preparation.

steps.title: Verify Reporting Period
steps.body: Confirm the reporting dates being prepared.

steps.title: Review Production Data
steps.body: Verify all production records are complete.

steps.title: Review Dispatch Data
steps.body: Confirm all excisable removals have been recorded.

steps.title: Review Inventory Balances
steps.body: Verify opening and closing stock positions.

steps.title: Prepare Return Data
steps.body: Compile required excise reporting information.

steps.title: Management Review
steps.body: Obtain approval prior to submission.

risks.prevention: Verify all production and dispatch records.

title: Quality Release Process
summary: Release of finished goods following quality review.
purpose: To ensure only compliant products are supplied to customers.
prerequisites: Completed production batch and quality testing.

steps.title: Review Batch Records
steps.body: Verify production documentation is complete.

steps.title: Review Test Results
steps.body: Confirm all specifications have been met.

steps.title: Review Deviations
steps.body: Assess any recorded production issues.

steps.title: Approve or Reject
steps.body: Determine whether the batch is suitable for release.

steps.title: Update Inventory Status
steps.body: Release approved stock for sale and distribution.

troubleshooting: Quarantine stock pending investigation if concerns exist.

title: Customer Complaints Handling
summary: Management of customer complaints relating to products or service.
purpose: To ensure complaints are investigated and resolved consistently.
safety_notes: Escalate any consumer safety concerns immediately.

steps.title: Record Complaint
steps.body: Capture all relevant information.

steps.title: Assign Investigation
steps.body: Allocate responsibility for review.

steps.title: Review Records
steps.body: Examine batch, production and distribution information.

steps.title: Determine Root Cause
steps.body: Identify contributing factors.

steps.title: Respond to Customer
steps.body: Provide timely and professional feedback.

steps.title: Implement Improvements
steps.body: Apply CAPA actions where appropriate.

troubleshooting: Escalate serious complaints to management immediately.
